page.title: Email
page.intro: Send invoices, reminders, and payment thank-yous from {business}'s own domain. Powered by Resend; bring your own API key.

setup.heading: Setup ({done}/{total})
setup.allDone: Email is fully set up. You can send invoices anytime.

kek.title: Master encryption key configured
kek.detailOk: EMAIL_KEY_ENCRYPTION_KEY is set in this deployment.
kek.detailTodo: Add a 32-byte hex key (openssl rand -hex 32) to Vercel as EMAIL_KEY_ENCRYPTION_KEY, then redeploy.
kek.cta: How to set the master key →

apiKey.title: Resend API key saved
apiKey.detailTodo: Sign up at resend.com (free), create an API key, paste it below.
apiKey.detailBlocked: Set the master encryption key first.

domain.title: Sending domain verified
domain.detailOk: DKIM and SPF records verified at Resend.
domain.detailTodo: Add the domain below, copy the DNS records into your registrar, then click Verify.
domain.detailBlocked: Save an API key first — Resend domain checks need it.

from.title: From / Reply-To addresses set
from.detailTodo: Set the From address (e.g. info@malcom.io) and the Reply-To (your real mailbox).

webhook.title: Resend webhook secret configured
webhook.detailOk: RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET is set; delivered/bounced events will update invoice status.
webhook.detailTodo: Create a webhook in Resend dashboard, copy the whsec_… signing secret, then paste it into /system/deploy → Resend webhook secret. Shyre writes it to Vercel and redeploys for you.
webhook.cta: How to set the webhook secret →

test.title: Test send confirmed
test.detailTodo: Click "Send test to me" below to verify end-to-end delivery before sending to a customer.

config.heading: Email config
config.apiKeyHasValuePlaceholder: (saved — paste a new key to replace)
config.apiKeyHint: Sign up at resend.com (free tier covers 3,000 emails/month) and create an API key with Permission: Full access — sending-only keys are rejected by domain verification. The key is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM; only the messaging module can decrypt.
config.apiKeyExpiresAtHint: Optional reminder date. Leave blank when saving a new key and Shyre fills in today + 1 year so the dashboard banner can warn you 30, 7, and 0 days out.
config.fromEmailHint: Must use a verified domain (configure below).
config.replyToEmailHint: Where customer replies land — usually your real mailbox (e.g. marcus@malcom.io).
config.dailyCapHint: Sent today: {sent} / {cap}. Caps abuse if a key is compromised.
config.signatureHint: Auto-appended below every invoice email body. Use plain text — line breaks are preserved.
config.testSent: Test email sent — check your inbox.

domain.heading: Verified domains
domain.intro: Add your domain so emails come from your address (info@malcom.io) instead of a generic sender. Add the DNS records below to your domain registrar, then click Verify.
domain.propagationNote: DNS changes are slow — typically 5–30 minutes to propagate, sometimes longer. If Verify says the records aren't detected yet, that's normal; wait a few minutes and try again.
domain.added: Domain added — add the DNS records, then verify.
domain.needsApiKey: Save an API key before adding a domain.
domain.empty: No domains added yet. Add one to start sending.
domain.recordsIntro: Add these records to your DNS, then click Verify.
domain.priorityHint: Priority applies to MX records only — copy the exact value into your registrar's Priority field. TXT and CNAME rows show — and don't need a priority.

intro.invoice_send: Default subject + body for the email that delivers a new invoice. Customizable per send.
intro.invoice_reminder: Default subject + body for late-invoice reminders (Phase 2).
intro.payment_thanks: Default subject + body for the thank-you email when a payment lands (Phase 3).

template.variablesIntro: Wrap any of these in % signs to insert at send time.

deploy.title: Deployment
deploy.intro: Connect Shyre to your deployment environment so /system/deploy can push instance-wide secrets (master encryption key, Resend webhook secret) directly to your hosting provider — no copy-pasting into a dashboard.

connection.heading: Vercel connection
connection.intro: Paste a Vercel API token and your project ID. The token is RLS-protected and never exposed to client code.
connection.apiTokenSetPlaceholder: (saved — paste a new token to replace)
connection.apiTokenHint: Create at vercel.com/account/tokens with scope = full account or just this project. Required scopes: read + write to project env vars.
connection.apiTokenExpiresAtHint: Optional reminder date. Leave blank when saving a new token and Shyre fills in today + 1 year so the dashboard banner can warn you 30, 7, and 0 days out.
connection.projectIdHint: From Vercel project Settings → General → Project ID. Starts with prj_.
connection.vercelTeamIdHint: Only needed for team / organization Vercel accounts. Personal accounts leave blank.
connection.deployHookUrlHint: Vercel project Settings → Git → Deploy Hooks → Create. Posting to this URL triggers a redeploy after env vars change. Without it, you'll need to redeploy manually.

provision.kekIntro: Generate a fresh 32-byte key, write it to Vercel as EMAIL_KEY_ENCRYPTION_KEY across all environments, and trigger a redeploy.
provision.kekAlreadySet: EMAIL_KEY_ENCRYPTION_KEY is already set in this deployment.
provision.kekDangerHeading: ⚠️ Rotating the master key invalidates every stored API key.
provision.kekDangerDetail: Every team_email_config.api_key_encrypted in the database is wrapped (directly or via the team's DEK) under the current master key. Replace it and existing API keys become unrecoverable — users will need to re-paste their Resend keys. Type 'regenerate' below to confirm.
provision.kekSent: Encryption key written to Vercel. Redeploy is in progress.
provision.webhookIntro: Paste the whsec_… signing secret from Resend dashboard → Webhooks. Shyre writes it to Vercel as RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET and triggers a redeploy.
provision.webhookAlreadySet: RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET is already set. Pasting a new value replaces it.
provision.webhookSent: Webhook secret written to Vercel. Redeploy is in progress.
provision.redeployIntro: Trigger a redeploy without changing env vars. Useful if you edited the env directly in Vercel.

send.modalSubtitle: Review the email before it goes to your customer.
send.subject: Subject
send.previewMissingConfig: Email isn't configured yet. Visit /teams/{teamId}/email to set up.
send.previewMissingDomain: From address {address} isn't on a verified domain. Visit /teams/{teamId}/email to verify.
